TCGA-STAD Tumor Microenvironment Signature Scores

Source: R/data_doc.R
eset_tme_stad.Rd

Pre-calculated tumor microenvironment (TME) signature scores for TCGA stomach adenocarcinoma (STAD) samples. Contains expression levels of key TME-related genes and potentially immune/stomal signature scores.

Usage

data(eset_tme_stad)

Format

A numeric matrix with genes/signatures as rows and samples as columns:

Rows

Gene symbols or signature names (e.g., B2M, HLA-B, HSPB1)

Columns

TCGA sample identifiers (e.g., TCGA-3M-AB46-01A)

Values

Normalized expression values (appears to be log2-scale)

Source

The Cancer Genome Atlas Stomach Adenocarcinoma (TCGA-STAD)

References

Cancer Genome Atlas Research Network. Comprehensive molecular characterization of gastric adenocarcinoma. Nature. 2014;513:202-209. doi:10.1038/nature13480

Examples

data(eset_tme_stad)
head(eset_tme_stad)
#>       TCGA-3M-AB46-01A TCGA-3M-AB47-01A TCGA-B7-5818-01A TCGA-B7-A5TI-01A
#> B2M           9.291109        10.261340        11.274710        10.602282
#> HLA-B         8.887707         9.039688        10.500060         8.947773
#> HSPB1         8.799836         8.876553        12.025419        10.087879
#> HLA-C         8.785831         9.054182        10.808559         9.696904
#> HLA-A         8.822077         8.767348        10.752121         8.147327
#> ACTG2         5.396086         5.845917         5.978796         4.387873
